title: ranunculus geraniifolius subsp. gouanii
intro: Ranunculus geraniifolius subsp. gouanii, also known as Gouan's Buttercup, is a subspecies of the Ranunculus geraniifolius plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gouan's Buttercup include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal uses, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
